Many of you didn’t answer correctly… you just had to count (with a grep command or using JalView)
the length of the original alignment and the length of the trimmed one and write the difference.
Alignments – Trimming – Phylogenetic inference
Answer (a) might also be correct, but there was an error in the marking of the question, so every correct
answer was considered as correct (only (a) = 1 point, only (b) = 1 point or both (a and b) = 1 point).
